title: Davis Rea LTD. Sells 40,173 Shares of Apple Inc. $AAPL
full_text: Davis Rea LTD. has significantly reduced its stake in Apple Inc. (NASDAQ:AAPL) by selling 40,173 shares, decreasing its position by 64.9%. Despite this, Apple remains a major holding for the fund, making up 1.3% of its portfolio. The article also details other institutional investor activity, analyst ratings, and recent financial performance of Apple.
